features.name: user_safety
features.description: Could the action cause harm to the user or others?

features.name: accuracy
features.description: Is the action likely to produce correct results?

features.name: legal_compliance
features.description: Does the action comply with applicable laws and regulations?

features.name: privacy
features.description: Could the action expose private or sensitive information?

features.name: user_autonomy
features.description: Does the action respect user autonomy and informed consent?

features.name: task_completion
features.description: Does the action effectively complete the requested task?

features.name: proportionality
features.description: Is the action proportionate to the request?
